title: Events & Spinal Health Associate
description:
Events & Spinal Health Associate

Core Responsibilities

  • Tactical Event Execution: Lead the end-to-end logistics of corporate roadshows, including the professional assembly and decommissioning (set up & tear down) of event booths and diagnostic equipment. 

  • Precision Health Screening: Administer non-invasive Digital Posture Analysis and Spinal Thermography/Electromyography (sEMG) scans to evaluate vertebral subluxation and muscular imbalances. 

  • Clinical Education: Translate complex screening data into actionable health insights, educating corporate participants on the link between spinal alignment, nervous system function, and workplace ergonomics. 

  • Musculoskeletal Risk Identification: Help participants interpret scan results to pinpoint potential scoliosis, kyphosis (hunchback), or repetitive strain injuries (RSI) stemming from sedentary office habits. 

  • Strategic Personal Selling: Drive the conversion of leads by articulating the value of comprehensive spinal consultations and successfully closing sales for on-site or clinic-based assessments. 

  • Lead Management & Appointment Setting: Efficiently manage the booking pipeline by securing firm appointments for follow-up care and consultation. 

  • Brand Ambassadorship: Actively represent and cross-promote Truevine Connection’s ecosystem of corporate wellness services, including our 5 Pillars of Wellness programs. 

  • Ability to travel to different event locations. 

Skills Required 

  • High-Impact Sales & Personal Selling: Ability to build instant rapport and overcome objections in a fast-paced event environment. 

  • Dynamic Communication: Mastery of active listening to understand participant pain points and provide empathetic, health-focused solutions. 

  • Events Management & Coordination: Proven experience in the "boots on the ground" reality of events crew work and logistics. 

  • Technical Aptitude: Ability to learn and operate diagnostic health screening technology with precision. 

Why Join Truevine Connection? 

  • Industry-Leading Training: No prior chiropractic experience? No problem. We provide comprehensive technical training on spinal anatomy, screening technology, and high-conversion sales scripts. 

  • Competitive Financial Rewards: We offer a solid base salary supplemented by a high-tier commission structure—your earning potential is directly tied to your hustle. 

  • Leaning Opportunities: Work at the intersection of Health-Tech and Corporate Wellness with a company that values "trusting the process" and personal professional development. 

  • Impactful Work: You aren't just selling; you’re helping white-collar professionals identify health issues before they become chronic problems. 

  • Age-Agnostic: We welcome applicants of all ages. We value the maturity and life experience of older candidates as much as the energy of younger ones. 

  • Gender-Inclusive: This role is open to everyone, regardless of gender identity. 

  • Merit-Based: We hire based on your character, your communication skills, and your drive to succeed. 

  • Dynamic Environment: No two days are the same—you'll be working across various corporate offices and event spaces in Singapore.

postedCompany.description:
Truevine Connection: Elevating Corporate Wellness

Truevine Connection is a Singapore-based corporate wellness and employee engagement partner. We specialize in bridge-building between corporate HR teams and a diverse ecosystem of wellness vendors to deliver holistic, high-impact health and engagement programs.

Our Vision

Our vision is to redefine the corporate landscape by making holistic well-being the cornerstone of every workplace. We believe that a thriving business starts with a thriving workforce. By integrating our 5 Pillars of Wellness—Physical, Mental, Financial, Social, and Career—we empower organizations to foster environments where employees are not just productive, but truly engaged and supported.

Our Business Model

Truevine Connection operates as a sophisticated multi-sided platform. We act as:

  • The Strategic Partner for HR: Designing and pitching comprehensive employee benefit programs that align with corporate goals.

  • The Expertise Hub for Co-organizers: Collaborating with healthcare providers and industry experts to ensure technical excellence in our delivery.

  • The Business Gateway for Vendors: Providing a central order point and matchmaking service that connects quality wellness vendors with meaningful corporate opportunities.

Our Accomplishments

  • Proven Impact: Successfully served and partnered with over 300+ companies across Singapore.

  • Holistic Framework: Developed a proprietary wellness strategy centered on the 5 Pillars of Wellness, moving beyond traditional "health talks" to create sustainable culture shifts.

  • Dynamic Solutions: From on-site health screenings and mental health workshops to financial literacy sessions and social team-building, we have a track record of delivering versatile, top-tier training and event materials tailored to white-collar environments.
postedCompany.name: TRUEVINE CONNECTION LLP
